name: POST /api/templates/ai-builder
description: AI Template Builder: Generates a complete professional template based on classification.

parameters.name: endpoint
parameters.value: {'method': 'POST', 'path': '/api/templates/ai-builder', 'details': {'tags': ['templates'], 'summary': 'Ai Template Builder', 'description': 'AI Template Builder: Generates a complete professional template based on classification.', 'operationId': 'ai_template_builder_api_templates_ai_builder_post', 'security': [{'OAuth2PasswordBearer': []}], 'parameters': [{'name': 'industry_id', 'in': 'query', 'required': True, 'schema': {'type': 'string', 'format': 'uuid', 'title': 'Industry Id'}}, {'name': 'category_id', 'in': 'query', 'required': True, 'schema': {'type': 'string', 'format': 'uuid', 'title': 'Category Id'}}, {'name': 'subcategory_id', 'in': 'query', 'required': False, 'schema': {'anyOf': [{'type': 'string', 'format': 'uuid'}, {'type': 'null'}], 'title': 'Subcategory Id'}}, {'name': 'X-Token', 'in': 'header', 'required': False, 'schema': {'anyOf': [{'type': 'string'}, {'type': 'null'}], 'title': 'X-Token'}}], 'responses': {'200': {'description': 'Successful Response', 'content': {'application/json': {'schema': {'$ref': '#/components/schemas/TemplateResponse'}}}}, '422': {'description': 'Validation Error', 'content': {'application/json': {'schema': {'$ref': '#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError'}}}}}}}
